allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('totalHits:', d.get\('totalHits'\), 'foods:', len\(d.get\('foods',[]\)\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('foodItems',[]\); print\('foodItems:', len\(items\)\); [print\(f' id={i.get\(\\"id\\"\)!r:.30} offId={i.get\(\\"offId\\"\)!r:.25} name={i.get\(\\"name\\"\)}'\) for i in items[:3]]")
